generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our over-reliance on foreign tech is making us vulnerable? While some argue for more international cooperation, history shows that true security comes from self-reliance. Look at how past crises unfolded when we depended on others for critical supplies. It's time to prioritize our own strategic autonomy. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
